attacking_style: Engages in late-race breakaway attempts, typically in the closing kilometers when the main field is still organized. Shows willingness to attack solo or in small groups without team support.
team_tactics: Operates with minimal team support, often the last or only Bardiani rider in contention. No evidence of coordinated team leadout or tempo control - relies on individual opportunism.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preferences. Has shown ability to survive in WorldTour-level races across varied parcours.
vulnerability: Lacks team support in decisive moments, making it difficult to sustain attacks against organized opposition. Breakaway attempts have been absorbed before the finish.
key_patterns: Frequently isolated without teammates in finale, must rely entirely on individual strength (2 instances)
Attempts late-race moves that are ultimately unsuccessful, absorbed by organized peloton or favorites
Capable of holding position in reduced groups despite lack of team support
form_trajectory: unknown: insufficient recent data and too large gap between observations to assess trajectory
